name: ExtensionSubstanceProtein_DisulfideLinkage
title: R5: The disulphide bond between two cysteine residues either on the same subunit or on two different subunits shall be described. The position of the disulfide bonds in the SubstanceProtein shall be listed in increasing order of subunit number and position within subunit followed by the abbreviation of the amino acids involved. The disulfide linkage positions shall actually contain the amino acid Cysteine at the respective positions (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SubstanceProtein.disulfideLinkage` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SubstanceProtein.disulfideLinkage` 0..* `string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `SubstanceProtein.disulfideLinkage` 0..* `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SubstanceProtein.disulfideLinkage` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubstanceProtein` is not mapped.
Element `SubstanceProtein.disulfideLinkage` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
